discipline: TDD pure: Red → Green → Refactor; ≥80% c8 line coverage on new TS, ≥80% tarpaulin on new Rust

stories.title: Phase 0 housekeeping: delete stale build outputs + record tarpaulin baseline
acceptanceCriteria: Files project/src/bridge/{client.js,client.d.ts,schemas.js,schemas.d.ts} deleted; project/src/bridge/client.ts and schemas.ts retained as canonical
vitest baseline run: `npx vitest run --reporter=verbose` shows zero suites and exits 0

Tarpaulin baseline file .omc/notes/rti-baseline-coverage.md created with crate-wide coverage % from `cargo tarpaulin --manifest-path project/crates/rti_core/Cargo.toml --skip-clean --out Stdout` (record number; <80% accepted as baseline, slice-1 gates use --include-files for new files)
tsconfig.json includes project/src/**/*.{ts,tsx} and excludes public/app, dist, .design-package

stories.title: Mock data port — channels, anomalies, events, trackPoints, synthesizer
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/mock/channels.ts exports 36 typed ChannelSummary (matching public/app/data.jsx CHANNEL_GROUPS) with fields {channelId, name, displayName, group, unit, channelType, sampleRateHz, qualityPolicy, tags}

project/src/mock/channels.test.ts: vitest unit verifies channel #1001 (bus_voltage) exists with channelType='analog', unit='V', sampleRateHz=200; channel #2210 (rpy_roll) exists with channelType='pose3d', unit='deg', sampleRateHz=100
project/src/mock/anomalies.ts exports ANOMALY fixture with fields {anomalyId, channelId, timestampNs, severity, score, label}
project/src/mock/anomalies.test.ts asserts ANOMALY id='anom-001' / channelId=1205 / severity='high'
project/src/mock/events.ts exports EVENTS array (typed)
project/src/mock/trackPoints.ts exports TRACK_POINTS array (lat/lon/alt/t typed)
project/src/mock/synthesizer.ts ports bus.jsx 30Hz synthesizer logic to TS with type-safe API; unit test asserts synthesize(channelId=1001, t=0) returns finite number, sin-based shape stable per t
All tests above written FIRST (Red) and pass after implementation (Green); c8 line coverage ≥80% on new mock files

stories.title: Domain types: LayoutNode union with FlatGridNode + PanelInstance + PanelBinding
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/types/domain.ts exports LayoutNode = SplitNode | TabNode | PanelNode | FlatGridNode union
FlatGridNode has fields {type:'flat-grid', id, columns, rows, cells: PanelCellPosition[]} where PanelCellPosition = {panelId, gx, gy, gw, gh}
PanelInstance type matches spec §6.1 (id, kind, title, layoutNodeId, bindings, options, uiState, createdAt, updatedAt)
PanelBinding union covers channel|channelGroup|anomaly|video|mapLayer|graphNode (spec §6.2)
PanelKind union covers all 13 panel kinds + 'globe' + 'gpslos'
project/src/types/domain.test.ts compiles + asserts type-narrowing helpers (isFlatGridNode, isSplitNode, etc.)

stories.title: WorkspaceStore (Zustand) — LayoutNode tree, panels, presets, dirty
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/store/workspaceStore.ts exposes useWorkspaceStore with state {workspaceId, workspaceName, layoutTree, panels, presets, dirty}
Actions: setLayoutTree, addPanel, removePanel, updatePanel, splitPanel(panelId, direction), savePreset, loadPreset, markDirty
Unit test workspaceStore.test.ts verifies: initial state, addPanel adds to map, removePanel removes from map and tree, splitPanel converts PanelNode → SplitNode with 2 children
FlatGridNode preset 'workstation-default' loadable; reproduces 14-panel grid from public/app/app.jsx INITIAL_PANELS exactly (gx,gy,gw,gh per cell)
c8 ≥80% on workspaceStore.ts

stories.title: SessionStore — appMode, playback, ingest
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/store/sessionStore.ts exports useSessionStore with state {appMode, activeProjectId, activeRunId, playback:{isPlaying,rate,currentTimeNs,selectionRange,loopEnabled}, ingest:{sourceConnected,packetRateHz,frameRateHz,crcFailRate,syncLossCount}}
Actions: setAppMode, togglePlay, setRate, setCursor, updateIngest
Unit test verifies appMode toggle Live↔Replay resets playback.isPlaying to false, persists currentTimeNs

stories.title: SelectionStore — channels/anomaly/cursor
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/store/selectionStore.ts exports useSelectionStore with state {selectedChannelIds, selectedPanelId, selectedAnomalyId, selectedGraphNodeId, selectedPoint, hoverPoint, linkedCursorEnabled, globalCursorNs}
Actions: selectChannel(id, additive), clearChannelSelection, selectPanel, selectAnomaly, setGlobalCursor, toggleLinkedCursor
Unit test: additive selection adds to set; non-additive replaces; setGlobalCursor with linkedCursorEnabled fans out timestamp to subscribers (verified via spy)

stories.title: StreamStore — subscriptions, panelDataRefs, RAF coalescer
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/store/streamStore.ts exports useStreamStore with state {subscriptions, buffers, panelDataRefs, performance:{uiFps,renderLatencyMsP95,eventQueueDepth}}
Actions: subscribe(panelId, channelIds, schema), unsubscribe(subscriptionId), pushFrame(subscriptionId, frame), tickRaf
RAF coalescer test: 1000 pushFrame calls in one RAF window result in exactly 1 React notification (spy on subscribers)
useStreamSubscription hook exposed for panels (spec §8.4 ownership)

stories.title: IntegrationStore — matlab/llm/simdis/map/exportJobs/offlineAssets
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/store/integrationStore.ts state per spec §8.5
Actions: setMatlabState, setLlmState, setSimdisState, setMapState, addExportJob, updateExportJob, setOfflineAssets
Unit test verifies exportJob lifecycle queued→running→completed transitions

stories.title: Bridge client extension + 6 contract _test.js → vitest port
acceptanceCriteria: project/tests/unit/bridge_schema.spec.ts ports bridge_schema_test.js coverage to vitest
project/tests/unit/bridge_client.spec.ts ports bridge_client_test.js coverage
project/tests/unit/app_contract.spec.ts ports app_contract_test.js
project/tests/unit/pcm_decoder.spec.ts ports pcm_decoder_test.js
project/tests/unit/channel_metadata.spec.ts ports channel_metadata_test.js
project/tests/unit/scaffold_contract.spec.ts ports scaffold_contract_test.js
All 6 spec.ts files pass `npx vitest run`
Original *_test.js files remain at project/tests/unit/legacy/ for `npm run test:legacy`

stories.title: Rust pcm::generator submodule + [[bin]] pcm_gen
acceptanceCriteria: project/crates/rti_core/src/pcm/generator.rs exports PcmGenerator struct with new(profile, channel_ids, bitrate_mbps) and step()->Vec<u16> producing valid frames using existing pcm::create_test_frame + pcm::frame_to_bits
project/crates/rti_core/tests/pcm_generator.rs unit asserts: step() produces 200Hz frames at 10Mbps target; CRC validates via pcm::decode_bitstream round-trip
project/crates/rti_core/Cargo.toml [[bin]] pcm_gen entry pointing to src/bin/pcm_gen.rs
src/bin/pcm_gen.rs: tokio UDP sender, args (--bind, --target, --bitrate-mbps, --channels, --duration-secs); sends generated frames at requested rate
cargo test --manifest-path project/crates/rti_core/Cargo.toml passes
tarpaulin coverage on new files ≥80%

stories.title: Rust perf gate — 60s @ 10Mbps UDP loopback, 0% loss
acceptanceCriteria: project/crates/rti_core/tests/datagram_throughput_smoke.rs ADAPTED: spawns pcm_gen + ManagedReceiverRuntime on localhost UDP for 60s @ 10Mbps; asserts dropped=0, accepted_bytes/elapsed_secs in [9.5e6, 10.5e6 bps]
project/crates/rti_core/tests/pcm_throughput_smoke.rs ADAPTED: decoder throughput + CRC fail rate <0.1% (F4 gate)
Both gated behind RUN_PERF_SMOKE=1 env (existing pattern); CI step runs with that env
scripts/check-perf.mjs parses cargo test --ignored output and asserts pass

stories.title: Phase 7 main.rs ≤30 LOC delta — verify channel #1001 wired
acceptanceCriteria: project/src-tauri/src/main.rs change ≤30 LOC: start_managed_receiver_loop default channel_ids includes 1001 if input.channel_ids is empty
Existing 36 #[tauri::command] impls retained unchanged
Cite main.rs:250-251 (subscribe_panel_data delegation), :399 (event emit) per Critic C8
cargo test passes (no regression to existing 30+ tests)

stories.title: Shell components — TopBar (visual + behavior)
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/shell/TopBar.tsx implements full topbar from public/app/shell.jsx TopBar visually (brand mark, project selector, mode toggle Live/Replay, RX status LEDs, bandwidth readout, sheet tabs, tools strip Library/Channels/Layout/Export/MATLAB/LLM/Tweaks)
Mode toggle calls SessionStore.setAppMode
Sheet tab click updates app.sheet state
RTL test TopBar.test.tsx verifies (a) all 14 buttons render, (b) Live↔Replay click toggles SessionStore, (c) bandwidth display formats from ingest store, (d) RX LED color reflects sourceConnected
Visual snapshot via @testing-library/jest-dom; pixel-diff handled by Playwright @visual in Phase 13

stories.title: Shell components — ChannelExplorer (LeftSidebar)
acceptanceCriteria: project/src/shell/ChannelExplorer.tsx ports public/app/shell.jsx ChannelExplorer: search box, filter chips (analog/discrete/spectrum/alarmed/favorite/good only/map-capable/video-linked), Favorites group, channel tree per group
Search input filters channel list (case-insensitive, matches name/displayName/unit)
Channel row drag-source: onDragStart sets DragChannelPayload
Virtualization for 10k+ channels (react-virtuoso or similar; spec E2)
RTL test: search 'voltage' → only matching channels visible; click filter chip toggles; drag start sets payload; favorite toggle persists in state

acceptanceCriteria: project/src/shell/DockGrid.tsx renders LayoutNode tree recursively; supports SplitNode, TabNode, PanelNode, FlatGridNode
FlatGridNode renders CSS grid with cells positioned via grid-column/grid-row matching gx/gy/gw/gh
DockGrid.test.tsx: workstation-default preset renders 14 PanelFrame nodes with exact (gx,gy,gw,gh) per public/app/app.jsx INITIAL_PANELS
PanelFrame component (header, body, footer, drop overlay 5-zone) ports public/app/app.jsx Panel component visually

stories.title: App composition + main.tsx + index.html updated

stories.title: Acceptance criteria proof — 30 spec items pass
acceptanceCriteria: All A1–A12, B1–B3, C1–C4, D1–D3, E1–E3, F1–F4, G1–G4 spec criteria mapped to passing tests per plan v3 §5
C4 fix verified: per-panel render-side cursor sync test passes (Strip cursor line, Map2D marker, Video frame, EventLog highlight, RelationGraph node)
E1 fix verified: RAF-budget assertion <16.7ms avg under 200Hz synthetic
Coverage: c8 ≥80% lines, branches ≥75% functions ≥80%; tarpaulin ≥80% on new Rust
scripts/build-acceptance-report.mjs produces .omc/notes/slice1-acceptance-report.md confirming 30/30

stories.title: Visual regression — Playwright @visual PR-blocking
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/visual/workstation.visual.spec.ts captures screenshot of WorkstationSheet at 1920x1080; compares against baseline at tests/e2e/visual/__snapshots__/
Baseline generated from public/app/ pristine render via Playwright comparison
Tolerance: 5px text, 2px chrome, 10px canvas (per plan)
CI step runs npm run e2e:visual; PR-blocking on diff >tolerance

stories.title: Real-browser perf gate — e2e_60fps Playwright headed
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/perf/e2e_60fps.perf.spec.ts: navigates to npm run dev, mounts Workstation, measures performance.now() across 10s of synth-driven frames
Median-of-3 strategy via repeatEach=3; assertion: median(mean_frame_ms) ≤16.7 AND median(p95_frame_ms) ≤25
Tier 3 rollback documented: if median p95 >30ms in 3 consecutive PRs, demote to nightly
CI step npm run e2e:perf PR-blocking

completionGate: All 25 stories US-000–US-024 have passes:true; reviewer (architect or critic agent) verifies fresh evidence against each acceptanceCriteria; vitest+cargo+playwright suites all green; ai-slop-cleaner pass on changed files; regression re-run green.
